SEARCH
Package io.github.michaelcirkl.ubsa

Interface BlobStorageSyncClient

All Known Implementing Classes:
AWSSyncClientImpl, AzureSyncClientImpl, GCPSyncClientImpl
public interface BlobStorageSyncClient
Synchronous provider-neutral client for bucket and blob operations.

This interface exposes a common API across AWS S3, Azure Blob Storage, and Google Cloud Storage.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Boolean
    blobExists(String bucketName, String blobKey)
    Returns whether the blob exists.
    Boolean
    bucketExists(String bucketName)
    Returns whether the bucket/container exists.
    String
    copyBlob(String sourceBucketName, String sourceBlobKey, String destinationBucketName, String destinationBlobKey)
    Copies a blob to another bucket/key and returns the ETag of the new blob when the provider exposes one.
    String
    createBlob(String bucketName, Blob blob)
    Creates or overwrites a blob using the key and content stored in the given Blob.
    String
    createBlob(String bucketName, String blobKey, InputStream content, long contentLength, BlobWriteOptions options)
    Creates or overwrites a blob from an input stream with a known content length.
    String
    createBlob(String bucketName, String blobKey, Path sourceFile)
    Creates or overwrites a blob from a local file.
    String
    createBlob(String bucketName, String blobKey, Path sourceFile, BlobWriteOptions options)
    Creates or overwrites a blob from a local file, applying optional write metadata such as content encoding and user metadata.
    Void
    createBucket(Bucket bucket)
    Creates a bucket/container.
    Void
    deleteBlobIfExists(String bucketName, String blobKey)
    Deletes the blob when it exists and does not fail when it is already missing.
    Void
    deleteBucket(String bucketName)
    Deletes the bucket/container.
    Void
    deleteBucketIfExists(String bucketName)
    Deletes the bucket/container when it exists and does not fail when it is already missing.
    URL
    generateGetUrl(String bucket, String objectKey, Duration expiry)
    Generates a temporary URL for downloading a blob.
    URL
    generatePutUrl(String bucket, String objectKey, Duration expiry)
    Generates a temporary URL for uploading a blob.
    Blob
    getBlob(String bucketName, String blobKey)
    Returns the blob content and metadata.
    Blob
    getBlobMetadata(String bucketName, String blobKey)
    Returns blob metadata without loading the content into memory.
    byte[]
    getByteRange(String bucketName, String blobKey, long startInclusive, long endInclusive)
    Returns the inclusive byte range from the blob content.
    Provider
    getProvider()
    Returns the underlying cloud provider for this client.
    default Iterable<Blob>
    iterateBlobs(String bucketName, String prefix, int pageSize)
    Lazily iterates across all blobs matching the given prefix using paginated listing requests.
    default Iterable<Bucket>
    iterateBuckets(int pageSize)
    Lazily iterates across all buckets/containers using paginated listing requests.
    List<Bucket>
    listAllBuckets()
    Returns all buckets/containers by repeatedly loading pages until exhaustion.
    ListingPage<Blob>
    listBlobs(String bucketName, String prefix, PageRequest request)
    Returns a single page of blobs in the given bucket/container.
    ListingPage<Bucket>
    listBuckets(PageRequest request)
    Returns a single page of buckets/containers.
    InputStream
    openBlobStream(String bucketName, String blobKey)
    Opens a streaming read for the blob content.
    <T> T
    unwrap(Class<T> nativeType)
    Returns the native SDK client when it matches the requested type.

  • Method Details

    • getProvider

      Provider getProvider()
      Returns the underlying cloud provider for this client.

    • unwrap

      <T> T unwrap(Class<T> nativeType)
      Returns the native SDK client when it matches the requested type.

      This can be used to access provider-specific features that are outside the UBSA abstraction.

      Supported client types are AWS S3Client, Azure BlobServiceClient, and GCP Storage.

      Returns:
      the native client, or null when the requested type does not match

    • bucketExists

      Boolean bucketExists(String bucketName)
      Returns whether the bucket/container exists.

    • getBlob

      Blob getBlob(String bucketName, String blobKey)
      Returns the blob content and metadata.

    • getBlobMetadata

      Blob getBlobMetadata(String bucketName, String blobKey)
      Returns blob metadata without loading the content into memory.

      The returned Blob has null content.

    • openBlobStream

      InputStream openBlobStream(String bucketName, String blobKey)
      Opens a streaming read for the blob content.

      The caller is responsible for closing the returned InputStream.

    • deleteBucket

      Void deleteBucket(String bucketName)
      Deletes the bucket/container.

    • blobExists

      Boolean blobExists(String bucketName, String blobKey)
      Returns whether the blob exists.

    • createBlob

      String createBlob(String bucketName, Blob blob)
      Creates or overwrites a blob using the key and content stored in the given Blob.

      If Blob.getContent() is null, an empty blob is created.

    • createBlob

      String createBlob(String bucketName, String blobKey, Path sourceFile)
      Creates or overwrites a blob from a local file.

    • createBlob

      String createBlob(String bucketName, String blobKey, Path sourceFile, BlobWriteOptions options)
      Creates or overwrites a blob from a local file, applying optional write metadata such as content encoding and user metadata.

    • createBlob

      String createBlob(String bucketName, String blobKey, InputStream content, long contentLength, BlobWriteOptions options)
      Creates or overwrites a blob from an input stream with a known content length.

    • deleteBlobIfExists

      Void deleteBlobIfExists(String bucketName, String blobKey)
      Deletes the blob when it exists and does not fail when it is already missing.

    • copyBlob

      String copyBlob(String sourceBucketName, String sourceBlobKey, String destinationBucketName, String destinationBlobKey)
      Copies a blob to another bucket/key and returns the ETag of the new blob when the provider exposes one.

    • listBuckets

      ListingPage<Bucket> listBuckets(PageRequest request)
      Returns a single page of buckets/containers.

      If request is null, the first page is requested with provider defaults.

    • listBlobs

      ListingPage<Blob> listBlobs(String bucketName, String prefix, PageRequest request)
      Returns a single page of blobs in the given bucket/container.

      If prefix is non-blank, only matching blob keys are returned. If request is null, the first page is requested with provider defaults.

    • listAllBuckets

      List<Bucket> listAllBuckets()
      Returns all buckets/containers by repeatedly loading pages until exhaustion.

    • iterateBuckets

      default Iterable<Bucket> iterateBuckets(int pageSize)
      Lazily iterates across all buckets/containers using paginated listing requests.

    • iterateBlobs

      default Iterable<Blob> iterateBlobs(String bucketName, String prefix, int pageSize)
      Lazily iterates across all blobs matching the given prefix using paginated listing requests.

    • createBucket

      Void createBucket(Bucket bucket)
      Creates a bucket/container.

    • deleteBucketIfExists

      Void deleteBucketIfExists(String bucketName)
      Deletes the bucket/container when it exists and does not fail when it is already missing.

    • getByteRange

      byte[] getByteRange(String bucketName, String blobKey, long startInclusive, long endInclusive)
      Returns the inclusive byte range from the blob content.

    • generateGetUrl

      URL generateGetUrl(String bucket, String objectKey, Duration expiry)
      Generates a temporary URL for downloading a blob.

    • generatePutUrl

      URL generatePutUrl(String bucket, String objectKey, Duration expiry)
      Generates a temporary URL for uploading a blob.
